title: Fees
doc_html:
PART XVII.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§171.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 632, §1; Acts 1982, No. 526, §2, eff. Aug. 11, 1982; Acts 1983, No. 235, §1, eff. July 1, 1983; Acts 1983, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 4, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1984; Acts 1984, No. 741, §1, eff. July 13, 1984; Acts 2008, No. 913, §2; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
